name: caldir
description: Çaldır! - Relay-first, uçtan uca şifreli telefon kontrol projesi

scripts.build: npm run build -w @caldir/shared && npm run build -w @caldir/server && npm run build -w @caldir/app && npm run build -w @caldir/test && npm run build -w @caldir/relay
scripts.smoke: npm run build -w @caldir/shared && npm run build -w @caldir/server && npm run build -w @caldir/test && npm run smoke -w @caldir/test
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @caldir/shared && npm run typecheck -w @caldir/shared && npm run build -w @caldir/server && npm run typecheck -w @caldir/server && npm run typecheck -w @caldir/app && npm run typecheck -w @caldir/test && npm run typecheck -w @caldir/relay
